# Synced from dcouple/orchestra — do not edit here

This directory is a one-way mirror of `codex/skills/` in
[dcouple/orchestra](https://github.com/dcouple/orchestra). Any edit made in a
consumer repo is overwritten by the next sync PR. Change skills in orchestra.

These are orchestrator-facing native Codex workflow adapters, installed at
`.agents/skills/`. Delegated roles are custom agents installed from
`codex/agents/` to `.codex/agents/`; workflow and role semantics live once in
`.references/`.
